normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 - Scheme Map No. 4 of 8 (Booragoon Locality)
version_date: Plot date 11 May 2022 (Version No 1; LPS6 gazetted Friday 27 May 2016)
scope_summary: Statutory scheme map sheet 4 of 8 under the City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 covering the Booragoon locality. Depicts local scheme zones (Residential, Centre, Light Industry, Service Commercial), local scheme reserves, Metropolitan Region Scheme region reserves (including public purposes - car park, Commonwealth Government, high school), R-Codes density codings (predominantly R20 with R12.5, R25, R40 and C4 areas), and an A1 additional-use notation. Used to determine the zoning and density coding applicable to individual lots in Booragoon.
quality_flags: scheme map drawing: low text volume is expected; extracted text (110 lines) is map labels and legend only
extractor-generated summary.json title is garbled OCR of density-code labels ('R20 R20 R20 D A R IS...')

OCR of map labels yields fragmented and reversed street-name strings (e.g. 'DAOR SDLONYER'); spatial zoning/coding assignments are not recoverable from text alone - use the original PDF or GIS data for lot-level determinations
